Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:weapon here].

====== Class Weapon ======
===== ammo =====
<pre>
 ammo()
</pre>

Returns the amount of [[#ammo]] left in this weapon.

===== is_reloading =====
<pre>
 is_reloading()
</pre>

Returns true if this weapon is reloading.

===== reload_time =====
<pre>
 reload_time()
</pre>

Returns the reload time left on this weapon.
Does only make sense if is_reloading() is true.

===== type =====
<pre>
 type()
</pre>

Returns the weapon [[#type]] in the form of a [[Lua weapontype|WeaponType]] object.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618082321/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:weapon -->
